welcome:
👋 Welcome to *BodyShapeCoach*!

I'm your personal AI nutritionist and fitness coach. I'll help you achieve your health and fitness goals through personalized meal plans, calorie tracking, and expert guidance.

Let's get started by creating your profile!

profile.welcome:
📋 *Let's create your personalized profile!*
This will help me create the perfect plan for you.

Please answer the following questions:

personal.height: What is your height in cm?
personal.weight: What is your current weight in kg?
personal.goal_weight: What is your goal weight in kg? (Optional)

fitness.goal:
What is your fitness goal?

• Lose weight (fat loss)
• Gain weight
• Build muscle
• Recomposition (lose fat + gain muscle)
• Maintain weight
fitness.activity:
What is your activity level?

• Sedentary (office job, little exercise)
• Lightly active (light exercise 1-3 days/week)
• Moderately active (moderate exercise 3-5 days/week)
• Very active (hard exercise 6-7 days/week)
• Athlete (twice per day, extra heavy workouts)

health.conditions: Do you have any health conditions? (Diabetes, thyroid issues, blood pressure, injuries, etc.)
health.allergies: Do you have any food allergies or intolerances?
health.medications: Are you taking any medications that affect weight or appetite?

diet.type:
What diet style do you prefer?

• Standard balanced
• High-protein
• Mediterranean
• Low-carb / Keto
• Vegetarian
• Vegan
• Halal-only food
diet.preferences: What foods do you love or hate? (List your favorite and disliked foods)
diet.meals: How many meals per day do you prefer? (1, 2, 3, 4, or 5+)

lifestyle.schedule: Do you work day shifts, night shifts, or rotating shifts?
lifestyle.location: Please share your location or country (this helps me include traditional foods)
lifestyle.training_location: Do you train at gym, home, or not training?
lifestyle.training_days: How many days per week can you train?
lifestyle.experience:
What is your training experience level?

• Beginner
• Intermediate
• Advanced

profile.complete:
✅ *Profile Complete!*

I've saved all your information and calculated your daily nutritional needs.

📊 *Your Daily Targets:*
• Calories: {{calories}}
• Protein: {{protein}}g
• Carbs: {{carbs}}g
• Fat: {{fat}}g

Would you like me to generate your first meal plan?

menu.main:
🏋️ *BodyShapeCoach Menu*

What would you like to do?

subscription.expired:
⚠️ *Subscription Required*

Your subscription has expired. To continue using BodyShapeCoach features, please renew your subscription.
subscription.success:
🎉 *Subscription Activated!*

Your {{plan}} subscription is now active until {{date}}.
subscription.invalid_key: ❌ Invalid subscription key. Please check and try again.

analysis.prompt: 📸 Please send a photo of your food for analysis.
analysis.result:
📊 *Food Analysis Results*

🍽️ *Food Items:*
{{items}}

📈 *Nutritional Summary:*
• Calories: {{calories}} kcal
• Protein: {{protein}}g
• Carbs: {{carbs}}g
• Fat: {{fat}}g

💡 *Tips:* {{tips}}

errors.general: ❌ An error occurred. Please try again or use /start to restart.
errors.profile_required: 📋 Please complete your profile first using /start
errors.subscription_required: 🔒 This feature requires an active subscription.
errors.image_processing: ❌ Failed to process image. Please try again with a clearer photo.
